{{Quote|The Dozen are not harassing the enemy, Master Skywalker, we're killing them. More Jedi should be doing the same.|[[Kyp Durron]] to [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]]|<ref name="The New Jedi Order: Star by Star">''[[The New Jedi Order: Star by Star]]''</ref>}}
'''Kyp's Dozen''', also known as the '''Dozen-and-Two Avengers''', were a [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[Squadron/Legends|squadron]] in the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]], founded by [[Kyp Durron]] and his apprentice [[Miko Reglia]]. The name was derived from the simple fact that the squadron consisted of 14 pilots. The fighters were mostly older: three [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wings]], two [[Z-95 Headhunter/Legends|Z-95 Headhunters]], [[RZ-1 A-wing interceptor/Legends|A-wings]], [[A/SF-01 B-wing starfighter/Legends|B-wing starfighters]], and [[T-65XJ X-wing starfighter|XJs]] for the two Jedi.

In [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]], the Avengers, specifically the squadron leader and [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] Kyp Durron, discovered a ship fleeing from some sort of emergency on [[Belkadan/Legends|Belkadan]] to the isolated [[Helska IV]] in the [[Helska system/Legends|Helska system]]. They trailed it there, only to be intercepted by a group of [[Yuuzhan Vong]] fighters, who annihilated the Dozen-and-Two, leaving only Kyp Durron and the other [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] in the squadron, Miko Reglia, alive, the latter landing on the [[Planet/Legends|planet's]] surface, and the former fleeing to [[Sernpidal/Legends|Sernpidal]].

Durron would reform a new Dozen-and-Two Avengers during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]. By [[25 ABY/Legends|25.7 ABY]], it consisted of thirteen X-wings, A-wings, and modified [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|Y-wings]]. Consisting of veterans already engaged in relief work, Durron reformed them, gaining classification as a support unit. However, to appease both [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and the [[New Republic Defense Force/Legends|New Republic Defense Force]], he changed the name to the '''Kyp's Dozen'''. The new squadron included Kyp, [[Ganner Rhysode]], [[Deak (Kyp's Dozen)|Deak]], and [[Yara (Human)|Yara]]. They were at [[Bothawui/Legends|Bothawui]] and the [[Battle of Kubindi]] in [[26 ABY/Legends|26 ABY]]. Five of its members died at the [[Second Battle of Sernpidal]]. They ran supplies for the [[New Plympto/Legends|New Plympto]] [[New Plympto resistance (Yuuzhan Vong War)|resistance]]. [[Octa Ramis]] joined the Dozen prior to the [[Battle of Coruscant (Yuuzhan Vong War)|Battle of Coruscant]], but she left during the battle, blaming Kyp for the loss of all the squadron's non-Jedi pilots.
